overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia traversing a stormy forest path at dusk. The character runs along a winding dirt trail surrounded by dense vegetation, stone walls, and ancient ruins while heavy rain falls and thunder rumbles in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with stone walls and landmark tree

agents.ego_description: Geralt running steadily along the forest path with swords on his back, moving away from the large twisted tree

entered.detail: Massive gnarled oak with thick trunk and sprawling dark branches dominating the right side of the path
Weathered gray stone wall running parallel to the path, covered in moss and vegetation
Winding dirt trail with patches of grass and mud from the rain
Snow-capped mountain visible through gaps in the forest canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail during a heavy storm. Geralt runs along a muddy path bordered by a moss-covered stone wall on the left and a massive twisted tree on the right. The atmosphere is tense with low visibility from rain and dusk lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path passing ancient stone ruins

events.description: large landmark tree passes out of view as the path opens toward stone ruins

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues running through the forest, passing weathered stone structures on the right side of the path

entered.detail: Ancient crumbling stone walls and foundations partially reclaimed by vegetation
Large decaying tree trunk lying across the grassy terrain beside the path

segments.scene_description: As Geralt moves deeper into the forest, the large tree recedes behind him and the path opens to reveal ancient stone ruins on the right. The stone wall continues on the left but at a greater distance, and the terrain becomes slightly more open with scattered dead trees and fallen logs.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with stone walls and path intersection

events.description: character makes a sharp left turn at a path intersection to follow the main trail

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches a path intersection, turns left onto a continuation of the trail, and maintains a steady running pace through the storm

entered.detail: Diverging dirt paths forming a Y-intersection in the forest clearing
Weathered wooden posts marking the boundary of the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment features Geralt navigating a path intersection where he turns left onto a continuation of the trail. The stone wall returns to the left side at close proximity, and the path winds through increasingly dense forest vegetation as the storm continues to rage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a storm-lashed forest trail that shifts from a claustrophobic wooded path to an open area of ruins before closing back in. It begins with Geralt running along a muddy track bordered by a moss-covered stone wall and a massive twisted tree under the dim light of dusk. As he moves deeper into the forest, the large tree recedes and the terrain opens up to reveal ancient stone ruins and scattered fallen logs. The scene then shifts as Geralt reaches a path intersection and turns left, bringing the stone wall back into close proximity. Finally, the trail winds through increasingly dense vegetation as the heavy rain continues to rage around him.
